title: Release Infrastructure: release-please + goreleaser + cocogito
summary: Decision to use release-please, goreleaser, and cocogito for SpecGraph versioning, changelog, and cross-platform release distribution.
notes: Filename/path uses 'design' and lives under specs/, suggesting SPEC, but content has Status/Decision/Consequences-style structure typical of an ADR; classified as ADR based on stronger content signal (Status: Approved + explicit Decision section).
